## Linked Issue

- Closes #<issue_number>

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] `feat`: New feature
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor`: Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `test`: Adds or updates tests
- [ ] `chore/ci/build/style/perf`: Maintenance or pipeline change

## Implementation Notes

List important design details, tradeoffs, or migration impacts.

## Testing

- [ ] I ran tests locally (`tox`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] New/changed Python lines in `custom_components/family_treasury/` are covered by tests
- [ ] I verified critical paths manually (if applicable)

Include exact commands and outcomes:

```text
<commands and results>
```

## Checklist

- [ ] PR links an existing issue
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Documentation updated (README/services/examples) when behavior changed
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] This PR is ready for review
